note: Maps each obligation to the evidence an auditor must obtain FROM THE REGULATED ENTITY to verify it -- you cannot govern a large operator from public data alone. Hand-maintained interpretation of each instrument's documentation/record-keeping duties; the official text governs. `kind` drives how ingestion.py validates a submitted artifact. Items keyed under `_model_probe` attach to any system that makes consequential decisions, independent of jurisdiction.

us-nyc-ll144.description: Historical AEDT selection/scoring decisions with sex and race/ethnicity categories, covering the most recent year of use (6 RCNY 5-301; imputed demographics not permitted).

eu-aiact-art6-highrisk.description: Data-governance evidence: training/validation/test data provenance, representativeness and error-checking (Art. 10).
Automatically generated event logs over the system's lifetime (Art. 12).

eu-aiact-gpai.description: Sufficiently detailed summary of training content + technical documentation (Art. 53).
For systemic-risk models: adversarial-testing / evaluation and incident records (Art. 55).

us-co-sb24-205.description: Impact assessment for the high-risk AI system (Colorado AI Act, consequential-decision duties).

us-federal-nist-rmf.description: NIST AI RMF profile mapping Govern/Map/Measure/Manage functions (voluntary).

_model_probe.description: Live API access (or a frozen response transcript) to the deployed decision model, for correspondence-test probing of the model itself (see probe_model.py).
